ex.jp: 彼女はその映画で主役を演じた。
ex.en: She played the lead role in that film.

qs.s: 新人ながら、彼は舞台の＿＿＿＿に大抜擢された。
qs.en: Though a newcomer, he was picked for the leading role on stage.
qs.e: 主役 = the leading role/star part (an actor's role). 脇役 = a supporting role. 主人公 = the protagonist/main character (of a story). 端役(はやく) = a bit part/minor role.

qs.s: 「主役」の意味は？
qs.e: 主役 is the starring role (主役を務める = play the lead). 主人公 is the story's central character; 主役 is the actor's role or the central figure of an event.

ex.jp: この小説は時代を超えて読まれる名作だ。
ex.en: This novel is a masterpiece read across the ages.

qs.s: その監督は、映画史に残る＿＿＿＿を数多く生み出した。
qs.en: That director produced many masterpieces that remain in film history.
qs.e: 名作 = a masterpiece/celebrated work. 駄作(ださく) = a worthless/poor work (the opposite). 新作 = a new work/release. 話題作 = a much-talked-about work.

qs.s: 「名作」の意味は？
o: a new work; a new release
qs.e: 名作 is a highly acclaimed work of lasting value (不朽の名作 = an immortal masterpiece). Opposite of 駄作.

m: zero points; a score of zero; (also) freezing point

ex.jp: 勉強しなかったので、テストで零点を取った。
ex.en: I didn't study, so I got a zero on the test.

qs.s: 答案が白紙のままで、結局＿＿＿＿だった。
qs.en: The answer sheet was left blank, so in the end it was zero.
qs.e: 零点 = a score of zero. 満点 = a perfect score (the opposite). 平均点 = the average score. 得点 = points scored/one's score.

qs.s: 「零点」の意味は？
o: zero points; a score of zero
qs.e: 零点 means scoring zero (零点を取る = get a zero). Opposite of 満点 (full marks). 零(れい) is the formal word for zero.

ex.jp: 余った料理は冷凍して保存する。
ex.en: I freeze and store the leftover food.

qs.s: 魚は新鮮なうちに＿＿＿＿しておくと長持ちする。
qs.en: If you freeze the fish while it's fresh, it keeps for a long time.
qs.e: 冷凍 = freezing (storing below 0°C). 冷蔵 = refrigeration (chilling, above freezing). 加熱 = heating. 解凍 = thawing/defrosting (the reverse of freezing).

qs.s: 「冷凍」の意味は？
qs.e: 冷凍 means freezing for preservation (冷凍食品 = frozen food, 冷凍庫 = freezer). 冷蔵 is mere chilling; 解凍 is thawing.

ex.jp: 水は常温では液体だ。
ex.en: Water is a liquid at room temperature.

qs.s: この物質は熱すると、固体から＿＿＿＿に変化する。
qs.en: When heated, this substance changes from a solid to a liquid.
qs.e: 液体 = liquid (a fluid state). 固体 = solid. 気体 = gas. 物体 = a physical object/body (any object).

qs.s: 「液体」の意味は？
qs.e: 液体 is the liquid state of matter (液体と固体と気体 = liquid, solid, and gas — the three states).

ex.jp: カメラの角度を少し変えてみよう。
ex.en: Let's try changing the camera angle a little.

qs.s: この問題は、別の＿＿＿＿から見ると解決策が見えてくる。
qs.en: This problem, seen from a different angle, reveals a solution.
qs.e: 角度 = angle; figuratively a viewpoint. 高度 = altitude; advanced level. 程度 = degree/extent (how much). 強度 = strength/intensity (of force).

qs.s: 「角度」の意味は？
qs.e: 角度 is a geometric angle (角度を測る = measure an angle) and figuratively a perspective (違う角度から = from a different angle).

ex.jp: 伝統的な儀式が神社で行われた。
ex.en: A traditional ceremony was held at the shrine.

qs.s: 成人を祝う＿＿＿＿は、地域ごとに少しずつ異なる。
qs.en: The rite celebrating coming of age differs slightly from region to region.
qs.e: 儀式 = a formal rite/ritual (often solemn, religious or traditional). 行事 = a scheduled event/function (calendar event). 式典 = a (grand) ceremony/official rite. 祭り = a festival.

qs.s: 「儀式」の意味は？
qs.e: 儀式 is a formal ritual following set procedures (宗教的儀式 = a religious rite, 儀式ばる = to be over-formal). 式典 is a large official ceremony; 行事 is any scheduled event.

m: manuscript; draft; copy (text to be printed/read)

ex.jp: 締め切りまでに原稿を書き上げた。
ex.en: I finished writing the manuscript before the deadline.

qs.s: スピーチの＿＿＿＿を用意していたが、緊張で読み飛ばした。
qs.en: I had prepared a draft of the speech, but skipped lines from nerves.
qs.e: 原稿 = a manuscript/draft (text written to be published or read aloud). 原作 = the original work (that an adaptation is based on). 脚本 = a screenplay/script (for a play/film). 資料 = reference materials/data.

qs.s: 「原稿」の意味は？
o: manuscript; draft; text to be printed/read
the original work an adaptation is based on
a screenplay; script for a play/film
qs.e: 原稿 is the written text submitted for printing or reading (原稿用紙 = manuscript paper, 原稿を書く = write a draft). 原作 is the source work behind an adaptation.

ex.jp: 二つの学校が合同で文化祭を開いた。
ex.en: The two schools held a joint cultural festival.

qs.s: 複数の部署が＿＿＿＿で会議を行い、対策を話し合った。
qs.en: Several departments held a joint meeting and discussed countermeasures.
qs.e: 合同 = combining separate groups into one (joint) activity. 共同 = doing something jointly/in common (shared). 協同 = cooperation/collaboration toward a goal. 合計 = the total/sum. 合同 and 共同 overlap, but 合同 stresses merging into one body.

qs.s: 「合同」の意味は？
o: joint; combined; merging groups for an activity
qs.e: 合同 means two or more bodies combining for an activity (合同練習 = joint practice, 合同説明会 = joint info session).

m: confluence; merging; joining up (of rivers, roads, people)

ex.jp: 二つの川がここで合流する。
ex.en: The two rivers join here.

qs.s: 先に行っていてください。後で現地で＿＿＿＿します。
qs.en: Please go ahead. I'll join up with you at the site later.
qs.e: 合流 = merging/joining up (streams converging, or people meeting up to continue together). 分岐 = branching/diverging (splitting off). 分裂 = splitting/fracturing apart. 解散 = disbanding/dispersing.

qs.s: 「合流」の意味は？
qs.e: 合流 means flowing or coming together into one (合流地点 = a merge point, 高速道路に合流 = merge onto the highway). Opposite of 分岐 (branch off).

ex.jp: 次の駅で電車の乗り換えがある。
ex.en: There's a train transfer at the next station.

qs.s: 新宿で地下鉄への＿＿＿＿が必要です。
qs.en: You need to transfer to the subway at Shinjuku.
qs.e: 乗り換え = transferring between trains/lines. 乗り越し = riding past one's stop (overshooting). 乗車 = boarding/getting on. 降車 = getting off/alighting.

qs.s: 「乗り換え」の意味は？
qs.e: 乗り換え means switching from one train/line to another (乗り換え案内 = transfer guide). Figuratively, switching (e.g. 機種の乗り換え = switching phone models). The verb is 乗り換える.

ex.jp: 広い敷地に大きな家が建っている。
ex.en: A large house stands on the spacious lot.

qs.s: 学校の＿＿＿＿内では、自転車を降りて歩いてください。
qs.en: On the school grounds, please get off your bicycle and walk.
qs.e: 敷地 = the site/premises on which a building stands. 土地 = land/a plot of ground (general). 用地 = land reserved for a specific use (建設用地 = construction land). 現場 = the actual site/scene (of work or an incident).

qs.s: 「敷地」の意味は？
o: site; lot; premises; grounds of a building
land reserved for a specific use
qs.e: 敷地 is the plot a building occupies, including its grounds (敷地面積 = lot area, 敷地内 = on the premises).

ex.jp: 夏休みに短期の語学留学をした。
ex.en: I did a short-term language study abroad over summer break.

qs.s: この仕事は＿＿＿＿のアルバイトなので、一か月で終わる。
qs.en: This job is short-term part-time work, so it ends in a month.
qs.e: 短期 = short term/short period. 長期 = long term (the opposite). 定期 = regular/fixed-period (定期券 = commuter pass). 延期 = postponement.

qs.s: 「短期」の意味は？
qs.e: 短期 means over a short span (短期間 = a short period, 短期大学 = junior college). Opposite of 長期.

ex.jp: 近所のスーパーで日用品をまとめて買う。
ex.en: I buy daily necessities all at once at the nearby supermarket.

qs.s: 洗剤やティッシュなどの＿＿＿＿は、安い時に買いだめする。
qs.en: I stock up on daily necessities like detergent and tissues when they're cheap.
qs.e: 日用品 = everyday goods/daily necessities. 貴重品 = valuables (precious items). 非常食 = emergency food rations. 記念品 = a commemorative gift/souvenir.

qs.s: 「日用品」の意味は？
qs.e: 日用品 are items used in daily life (生活日用品 = household necessities). Things like soap, towels, detergent.

ex.jp: 花嫁は美しいドレスを着ていた。
ex.en: The bride wore a beautiful dress.

qs.s: 式の途中、＿＿＿＿は感極まって涙を流した。
qs.en: During the ceremony, the bride was overcome with emotion and wept.
qs.e: 花嫁 = the bride. 花婿(はなむこ) = the bridegroom. 新郎(しんろう) = the groom (formal term). 仲人(なこうど) = the matchmaker/go-between.

qs.s: 「花嫁」の意味は？
qs.e: 花嫁 is the bride (花嫁姿 = a bride in her wedding attire). 花婿/新郎 = the groom.

ex.jp: 鍋の蓋を開けると湯気が立った。
ex.en: When I opened the pot's lid, steam rose.

qs.s: 瓶の＿＿＿＿が固くて、なかなか開かない。
qs.en: The bottle's cap is tight and won't open easily.
qs.e: 蓋(ふた) = a lid/cover/cap (on top). 底(そこ) = the bottom (of a container). 縁(ふち) = the rim/edge. 取っ手(とって) = a handle/grip.

qs.s: 「蓋」の意味は？
qs.e: 蓋 is a lid or cap that covers an opening (蓋を開ける = take the lid off, 蓋をする = put a lid on).

m: at one's feet; one's step/footing; (figurative) one's immediate situation

ex.jp: 暗いので足元に気をつけてください。
ex.en: It's dark, so please watch your step.

qs.s: 雨で道が滑りやすいので、＿＿＿＿に注意して歩いた。
qs.en: The road was slippery from the rain, so I walked watching my step.
qs.e: 足元 = the area at/around one's feet; one's footing. 頭上(ずじょう) = overhead/above one's head. 背後(はいご) = behind one/one's back. 目前(もくぜん) = right before one's eyes/imminent.

qs.s: 「足元」の意味は？
qs.e: 足元 refers to the ground at your feet and your footing (足元が悪い = poor footing, 足元に注意 = watch your step). Figuratively, 足元を見る = take advantage of someone's weak position.

ex.jp: クリスマスツリーに飾りを付けた。
ex.en: We put decorations on the Christmas tree.

qs.s: 派手な＿＿＿＿はやめて、シンプルなデザインにした。
qs.en: We dropped the flashy ornamentation and went with a simple design.
qs.e: 飾り = a decoration/ornament. 模様(もよう) = a pattern/design (on a surface). 包み(つつみ) = a wrapping/bundle. 汚れ(よごれ) = a stain/dirt.

qs.s: 「飾り」の意味は？
o: a pattern; design on a surface
qs.e: 飾り is something added for adornment (壁飾り = wall decoration, お飾り = a (mere) figurehead/ornamental thing). The verb is 飾る.

m: the other day; recently; a little while ago (casual)

ex.jp: こないだ話した件、どうなった？
ex.en: What happened with the matter we talked about the other day?

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿買ったばかりの傘を、もう失くしてしまった。
qs.en: I already lost the umbrella I just bought the other day.
qs.e: こないだ = the other day/recently (casual form of この間). これから = from now on. そのうち = before long/eventually. いつか = someday.

qs.s: 「こないだ」の意味は？
o: the other day; recently; a little while ago
qs.e: こないだ is a casual contraction of この間 (このあいだ), meaning 'the other day / recently' (こないだのこと = that thing from the other day).

ex.jp: 事故の原因は故障と推定される。
ex.en: The cause of the accident is presumed to be a malfunction.

qs.s: 発見された化石は、約一億年前のものと＿＿＿＿されている。
qs.en: The discovered fossil is estimated to be about a hundred million years old.
qs.e: 推定 = estimating/presuming from evidence or reasoning. 断定 = a definitive conclusion/asserting for certain. 推薦 = recommendation (endorsing). 予約 = a reservation/booking.

qs.s: 「推定」の意味は？
o: a definitive conclusion; asserting for certain
qs.e: 推定 is concluding something probable from available evidence (推定年齢 = estimated age, 推定無罪 = presumption of innocence). 断定 is asserting with certainty.

ex.jp: 大学では寮に住んでいた。
ex.en: In university I lived in a dormitory.

qs.s: 新入社員は、会社の＿＿＿＿に入ることもできる。
qs.en: New employees can also move into the company dormitory.
qs.e: 寮(りょう) = a dormitory/residence hall (for students or workers). 塾(じゅく) = a cram school/private tutoring school. 邸(てい) = a mansion/large residence. 荘(そう) = a villa/lodge (often in inn/apartment names).

qs.s: 「寮」の意味は？
qs.e: 寮 is shared lodging for students or employees (学生寮 = student dorm, 社員寮 = company dormitory, 寮生 = a dorm resident).

m: circulation; cycle; rotation (going around in a loop)

ex.jp: 運動すると血液の循環が良くなる。
ex.en: Exercise improves blood circulation.

qs.s: 資源を再利用する＿＿＿＿型の社会が目指されている。
qs.en: A recycling-based (circular) society is being aimed for.
qs.e: 循環 = circulation/cycling around a loop (returning to the start). 回転 = rotation/spinning; turnover. 流通 = distribution/circulation of goods or money through a market. 移動 = movement from place to place.

qs.s: 「循環」の意味は？
o: circulation; cycle; going around in a loop
distribution of goods through a market
qs.e: 循環 means moving in a repeating loop and returning (悪循環 = a vicious cycle, 循環バス = a loop-line bus, 血液循環 = blood circulation).

m: prize money; cash prize; monetary award

ex.jp: コンテストの優勝者には賞金が贈られる。
ex.en: A cash prize is given to the contest winner.

qs.s: その大会は＿＿＿＿が高額なことで知られている。
qs.en: That tournament is known for its large prize money.
qs.e: 賞金 = prize money/a cash award. 料金 = a fee/charge. 税金 = tax. 借金 = a debt/loan owed.

qs.s: 「賞金」の意味は？
o: prize money; cash prize; monetary award
qs.e: 賞金 is money awarded as a prize (賞金を獲得する = win prize money, 賞金王 = top prize earner). Distinct from 賞品 (a prize item/goods).

ex.jp: 乗車の際は足元にご注意ください。
ex.en: Please watch your step when boarding.

qs.s: この特急は全席指定で、＿＿＿＿には予約が必要だ。
qs.en: This express has all reserved seats; boarding requires a reservation.
qs.e: 乗車 = boarding/getting on a train or vehicle. 降車(こうしゃ) = getting off/alighting. 下車(げしゃ) = getting off (often to leave the station, e.g. 途中下車 = stopover). 運転 = driving/operating.

qs.s: 「乗車」の意味は？
qs.e: 乗車 means boarding (乗車券 = a (boarding) ticket, 乗車口 = the boarding door). Opposite of 降車/下車.

ex.jp: 彼は大学院で経済学を研究している。
ex.en: He researches economics in graduate school.

qs.s: より専門的に学ぶため、＿＿＿＿への進学を決めた。
qs.en: To study more specialized topics, I decided to go on to graduate school.
qs.e: 大学院 = graduate/postgraduate school (after a bachelor's). 大学 = university (undergraduate). 専門学校 = a vocational/technical college. 高校 = high school.

qs.s: 「大学院」の意味は？
qs.e: 大学院 is postgraduate study (大学院生 = grad student, 大学院修士課程 = master's program), pursued after 大学 (undergrad).

ex.jp: この区域は駐車禁止だ。
ex.en: This zone is no-parking.

qs.s: 工事中のため、立ち入り＿＿＿＿が制限されている。
qs.en: Due to construction, the entry zone is restricted.
qs.e: 区域 = a bounded zone/area (officially delimited). 区別 = distinguishing/telling apart. 区切り = a break/division point (in time or text). 領域 = a domain/territory/field (often abstract: 専門領域 = field of expertise).

qs.s: 「区域」の意味は？
qs.e: 区域 is a demarcated physical area (危険区域 = danger zone, 区域外 = outside the zone). 領域 leans more abstract (a field/sphere).

m: a (study) tour; visit for observation; field study

ex.jp: 小学生が工場の見学に来た。
ex.en: Elementary students came to tour the factory.

qs.s: 入学前に、希望者は校内を＿＿＿＿することができる。
qs.en: Before enrolling, prospective students can tour the campus.
qs.e: 見学 = visiting to observe and learn (educational). 見物(けんぶつ) = watching as a spectacle/sightseeing for fun. 観光 = tourism/sightseeing (leisure travel). 訪問 = a visit/call (going to see someone/somewhere).

qs.s: 「見学」の意味は？
o: a study tour; visiting to observe and learn
watching as a spectacle; for fun
qs.e: 見学 implies observing with the purpose of learning (社会見学 = an educational field trip, 工場見学 = a factory tour). 見物 is watching for entertainment.

ex.jp: 関東平野は日本で最も広い平野だ。
ex.en: The Kanto Plain is the largest plain in Japan.

qs.s: 山を越えると、目の前に広大な＿＿＿＿が広がっていた。
qs.en: Crossing the mountains, a vast plain spread out before us.
qs.e: 平野 = a (low, flat) plain. 盆地(ぼんち) = a basin (flatland surrounded by mountains). 高原(こうげん) = a plateau/highland. 海岸(かいがん) = the coast/seashore.

qs.s: 「平野」の意味は？
qs.e: 平野 is a broad area of flat low land (大平野 = a great plain). 盆地 is enclosed by mountains; 高原 is elevated flatland.

m: to be affectionate to; to dote on; to treat with love

ex.jp: 祖母は孫をとても可愛がっている。
ex.en: Grandmother dotes on her grandchildren.

qs.s: 先輩は後輩を厳しくも温かく＿＿＿＿いた。
qs.en: The senior was strict yet warmly affectionate toward the juniors.
qs.e: 可愛がる = to dote on/treat with affection. 怖がる = to be afraid of. 嫌がる = to dislike/be reluctant. 羨む(うらやむ) = to envy.

qs.s: 「可愛がる」の意味は？
o: to be affectionate to; to dote on
qs.e: 可愛がる means to treat someone/a pet with love and care (ペットを可愛がる = dote on a pet). The adjective 可愛い means 'cute.'

ex.jp: 安定した生活の基盤を築く。
ex.en: To build a foundation for a stable life.

qs.s: 中小企業は、地域経済の＿＿＿＿を支えている。
qs.en: Small and medium businesses support the foundation of the local economy.
qs.e: 基盤 = the underpinning/base supporting a system or activity (often abstract: 経済基盤, 生活基盤). 基礎 = the fundamentals/groundwork (knowledge, construction). 土台 = the foundation/base (literal, e.g. of a building) and figurative groundwork. 頂点 = the peak/apex (top).

qs.s: 「基盤」の意味は？
o: foundation; base; underpinning of a system
qs.e: 基盤 is the supporting base for activity (生活基盤 = the basis of one's livelihood, 基盤を固める = solidify one's footing). Close to 土台 but more abstract/systemic.

ex.jp: この動物は個体によって模様が異なる。
ex.en: This animal's markings differ from individual to individual.

qs.s: 同じ種でも、＿＿＿＿ごとに性格や大きさに差がある。
qs.en: Even in the same species, there are differences in temperament and size from individual to individual.
qs.e: 個体 = an individual organism/single specimen (biology). 団体 = a group/organization (collective body). 全体 = the whole/entirety. 物体 = a physical object (any object).

qs.s: 「個体」の意味は？
o: an individual organism; a single specimen
qs.e: 個体 is a single individual creature, especially in biology (個体数 = population count, 個体差 = individual variation).

ex.jp: 高校で日本の古典を学んだ。
ex.en: In high school I studied the Japanese classics.

qs.s: 『源氏物語』は日本文学の代表的な＿＿＿＿だ。
qs.en: 'The Tale of Genji' is a representative classic of Japanese literature.
qs.e: 古典 = the classics/classical works (literature, music). 現代 = the contemporary/present age. 近代 = the modern era (recent history). 古代 = ancient times (a historical period).

qs.s: 「古典」の意味は？
qs.e: 古典 refers to classic works of enduring value (古典文学 = classical literature, 古典音楽 = classical music). Note 古代 is a time period; 古典 is a body of works.

ex.jp: 来週の月曜日は祝日で学校が休みだ。
ex.en: Next Monday is a holiday, so school is off.

qs.s: 日本では、五月初旬に＿＿＿＿が続く大型連休がある。
qs.en: In Japan, there's a long holiday in early May with consecutive national holidays.
qs.e: 祝日 = a national/public holiday. 平日 = a weekday (ordinary working day). 休憩 = a break/rest (a short pause). 記念 = commemoration/memorial.

qs.s: 「祝日」の意味は？
qs.e: 祝日 is an officially designated public holiday (国民の祝日 = a national holiday, 祝日法 = the holiday law). Distinct from a personal day off (休日).

ex.jp: 彼はその家の長男だ。
ex.en: He is the eldest son of that family.

qs.s: 昔は、家業を＿＿＿＿が継ぐのが一般的だった。
qs.en: In the old days, it was common for the eldest son to take over the family business.
qs.e: 長男 = the eldest son. 次男(じなん) = the second son. 長女(ちょうじょ) = the eldest daughter. 末っ子(すえっこ) = the youngest child.

qs.s: 「長男」の意味は？
qs.e: 長男 is the first-born son (長男・長女 = eldest son/daughter). 次男 = second son, 三男 = third son.

m: diagonal; slanting; at an angle; oblique

ex.jp: 絵が斜めにかかっている。
ex.en: The picture is hanging crooked (at an angle).

qs.s: 交差点を＿＿＿＿に横切るのは危険だ。
qs.en: Crossing the intersection diagonally is dangerous.
qs.e: 斜め = diagonal/slanting/at an angle. 垂直(すいちょく) = vertical/perpendicular. 水平(すいへい) = horizontal/level. 平行(へいこう) = parallel.

qs.s: 「斜め」の意味は？
qs.e: 斜め means at a slant (斜めに線を引く = draw a diagonal line, 斜め前 = diagonally ahead). 機嫌が斜め = in a bad mood (idiom).

ex.jp: 給与は毎月二十五日に振り込まれる。
ex.en: The salary is deposited on the 25th of each month.

qs.s: 能力や成果に応じて＿＿＿＿が決まる仕組みだ。
qs.en: It's a system where pay is determined according to ability and results.
qs.e: 給与 = salary/pay (compensation for work). 料金 = a fee/charge (for a service). 費用 = expenses/costs. 予算 = a budget.

qs.s: 「給与」の意味は？
o: a fee; charge for a service
qs.e: 給与 is compensation paid for work (給与明細 = a pay slip, 基本給 = base pay). ≒ 給料, but 給与 is the more formal/comprehensive term.

m: ingenuity; devising a clever way; contrivance

ex.jp: 狭い部屋を広く見せる工夫をした。
ex.en: I devised a way to make the small room look spacious.

qs.s: 限られた予算でも、＿＿＿＿次第で良い物が作れる。
qs.en: Even on a limited budget, you can make good things depending on your ingenuity.
qs.e: 工夫 = devising clever ways/ingenuity (improving by thinking creatively). 努力 = effort/diligence (persistent hard work). 発明 = invention (creating something new). 面倒 = trouble/bother.

qs.s: 「工夫」の意味は？
o: ingenuity; devising a clever way; contrivance
qs.e: 工夫 means thinking up clever ways to improve or solve something (工夫を凝らす = put ingenuity into it, ひと工夫 = a little clever touch).

m: the head; the lead; the front (of a line or group)

ex.jp: 彼が行列の先頭に立っている。
ex.en: He is standing at the head of the line.

qs.s: マラソンで、その選手はずっと＿＿＿＿を走り続けた。
qs.en: In the marathon, that runner kept running at the front the whole time.
qs.e: 先頭 = the very front/lead position. 末尾(まつび) = the tail end/last part. 中央 = the center/middle. 背後 = behind/at the rear.

qs.s: 「先頭」の意味は？
o: the head; lead; front of a line or group
the tail end; the last part
qs.e: 先頭 is the leading position (先頭に立つ = take the lead, 先頭を切る = be the first to act). Opposite of 末尾/最後尾.

ex.jp: 率直な意見を聞かせてください。
ex.en: Please give me your frank opinion.

qs.s: 遠慮せず、＿＿＿＿に感想を述べてもらえると助かる。
qs.en: It helps if you give your impressions frankly, without holding back.
qs.e: 率直 = frank/candid/straightforward (saying things plainly). 遠回し(とおまわし) = roundabout/indirect (the opposite). 曖昧(あいまい) = vague/ambiguous. 慎重(しんちょう) = cautious/careful.

qs.s: 「率直」の意味は？
qs.e: 率直 means speaking openly and directly without sugarcoating (率直に言うと = frankly speaking).

ex.jp: この溶液の濃度を測定する。
ex.en: We measure the concentration of this solution.

qs.s: 空気中の二酸化炭素の＿＿＿＿が年々上がっている。
qs.en: The concentration of carbon dioxide in the air is rising year by year.
qs.e: 濃度 = concentration (amount of a substance per volume) / thickness. 温度 = temperature. 密度(みつど) = density (mass or number per space/area). 強度 = strength/intensity.

qs.s: 「濃度」の意味は？
o: concentration; density of a substance in a mixture
qs.e: 濃度 is how concentrated a substance is (塩分濃度 = salt concentration, 濃度が高い = highly concentrated). 密度 is mass/number packed into a space.

ex.jp: 切符は駅の窓口で買えます。
ex.en: You can buy tickets at the station window.

qs.s: 問い合わせは、こちらの＿＿＿＿で受け付けております。
qs.en: Inquiries are handled at this counter.
qs.e: 窓口 = a service window/counter where business is transacted; figuratively a contact point. 入口 = an entrance. 受付 = a reception desk (where you check in). 出口 = an exit.

qs.s: 「窓口」の意味は？
o: a service window/counter; point of contact
qs.e: 窓口 is the counter where you conduct business (銀行の窓口 = bank teller window) and figuratively the contact point (相談窓口 = a help/consultation desk).

ex.jp: 彼の話には矛盾がある。
ex.en: There's a contradiction in his story.

qs.s: 前に言ったことと今の主張が＿＿＿＿している。
qs.en: What you said before and your current claim are contradictory.
qs.e: 矛盾 = contradiction/inconsistency (two things that can't both be true). 一致 = agreement/coincidence (matching up). 調和 = harmony. 共通 = something in common/shared.

qs.s: 「矛盾」の意味は？
qs.e: 矛盾 means a logical contradiction (矛盾だらけ = full of contradictions). From a famous tale of a 矛 (spear) and 盾 (shield) that couldn't both be as claimed.

ex.jp: ボランティア活動には大きな意義がある。
ex.en: Volunteer work has great significance.

qs.s: 単に勝つことより、挑戦すること自体に＿＿＿＿がある。
qs.en: There is significance in the act of challenging itself, more than merely winning.
qs.e: 意義 = significance/worth/import (the value or point of something). 意味 = meaning/sense (of a word or situation). 意見 = an opinion. 意識 = consciousness/awareness. 意味 and 意義 overlap, but 意義 stresses worth/significance.

qs.s: 「意義」の意味は？
qs.e: 意義 emphasizes the value or significance of something (意義深い = deeply meaningful, 存在意義 = reason for being). 意味 is more about literal meaning.

m: one by one; each and every; (often) for every little thing

ex.jp: いちいち説明するのは面倒だ。
ex.en: It's a pain to explain each and every thing.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿細かいことに文句を言わないでほしい。
qs.en: I wish you wouldn't complain about every little thing.
qs.e: いちいち = one by one / for every single thing (often with annoyance). めったに = (with neg.) rarely. せいぜい = at most. たちまち = in an instant/suddenly.

qs.s: 「いちいち」の意味は？
o: one by one; for every little thing (often annoyed)
qs.e: いちいち means going through things one at a time, often with the nuance of 'for every trivial thing' (いちいちうるさい = nags about everything).

ex.jp: ごみは種類ごとに区分して出す。
ex.en: Trash is sorted by type before being put out.

qs.s: 資料を年代別に＿＿＿＿して、整理した。
qs.en: I divided the materials by era and organized them.
qs.e: 区分 = dividing into sections/categories (systematic classification). 区別 = distinguishing/telling two things apart. 分割 = splitting into portions/installments. 配分 = allocation/distributing shares.

qs.s: 「区分」の意味は？
qs.e: 区分 means systematically dividing into categories or sections (区分する = to classify/segment). 区別 is just telling things apart; 分類 is grouping by type.

ex.jp: この鉄道は複雑な系統に分かれている。
ex.en: This railway is divided into complex lines.

qs.s: 暖色＿＿＿＿の色でまとめると、部屋が温かい印象になる。
qs.en: Pulling the room together in warm-color tones gives it a cozy impression.
qs.e: 系統 = a system/lineage/line (a connected series, e.g. color family, bloodline, route). 系列 = a group of affiliated companies; a sequence/series. 種類 = a kind/type/variety. 分野 = a field/domain. 系統 stresses a connected line or family of things.

qs.s: 「系統」の意味は？
qs.e: 系統 denotes a connected line or family (青系統の色 = blue-family colors, 神経系統 = the nervous system, 血の系統 = bloodline).

ex.jp: 会社は事業を縮小することを決めた。
ex.en: The company decided to scale down its operations.

qs.s: 予算不足で、計画を大幅に＿＿＿＿せざるを得なかった。
qs.en: Due to lack of budget, we had no choice but to greatly scale down the plan.
qs.e: 縮小 = reducing/scaling down in size or scope. 拡大 = enlargement/expansion (the opposite). 拡張 = extension/expanding capacity. 増加 = increase in number/quantity.

qs.s: 「縮小」の意味は？
qs.e: 縮小 means making smaller in size or scope (規模を縮小 = scale down, 縮小コピー = a reduced-size copy). Opposite of 拡大.

ex.jp: その店は知人に紹介してもらった。
ex.en: I was introduced to that shop by an acquaintance.

qs.s: 友人というほど親しくはないが、＿＿＿＿は大勢いる。
qs.en: I don't have many close friends, but I have many acquaintances.
qs.e: 知人 = an acquaintance (someone you know, but not necessarily close). 親友 = a close/best friend. 他人(たにん) = a stranger/unrelated person. 恋人 = a lover/romantic partner.

qs.s: 「知人」の意味は？
qs.e: 知人 is someone you're acquainted with but not necessarily close to (知人を介して = through an acquaintance). 友人 implies more closeness; 親友 is a best friend.

ex.jp: 飛行機では通路側の席が好きだ。
ex.en: On planes I prefer the aisle seat.

qs.s: 非常時に備え、＿＿＿＿に物を置いてはいけない。
qs.en: In case of emergency, you must not place things in the passageway.
qs.e: 通路 = a passage/aisle/walkway (for people to pass through, indoors or in vehicles). 道路 = a road/street (for traffic). 線路(せんろ) = railway tracks. 回路(かいろ) = an (electric) circuit.

qs.s: 「通路」の意味は？
qs.e: 通路 is a path for people to walk through (通路側 = aisle side, 避難通路 = an evacuation route). 道路 is for vehicles.

ex.jp: 彼は有名な職人の弟子になった。
ex.en: He became the apprentice of a famous craftsman.

qs.s: その師匠は、これまで多くの優れた＿＿＿＿を育ててきた。
qs.en: That master has raised many excellent disciples over the years.
qs.e: 弟子(でし) = a disciple/apprentice who learns from a master. 師匠(ししょう) = the master/teacher (the one being learned from). 先輩 = a senior (more experienced peer). 仲間 = a companion/comrade/peer.

qs.s: 「弟子」の意味は？
qs.e: 弟子 is someone who studies under a master in a craft or art (弟子入りする = become an apprentice). The master is the 師匠.

ex.jp: 土の塊を手で砕いた。
ex.en: I crushed the lump of soil with my hands.

qs.s: 彼はまさに情熱の＿＿＿＿のような人だ。
qs.en: He is truly like a mass of passion personified.
qs.e: 塊(かたまり) = a lump/mass/chunk (a solid clump); figuratively, an embodiment (情熱の塊 = a ball of passion). 粒(つぶ) = a grain/small round bit. 欠片(かけら) = a fragment/shard. 粉(こな) = powder.

qs.s: 「塊」の意味は？
o: a grain; a small round bit
qs.e: 塊 is a solid clump (肉の塊 = a hunk of meat, 一塊 = one lump). Figuratively it means an embodiment of something (欲の塊 = pure greed).

ex.jp: 大学では建築学科に所属している。
ex.en: At university I belong to the architecture department.

qs.s: 運転免許の試験は、＿＿＿＿試験と技能試験に分かれている。
qs.en: The driver's license exam is divided into a written (subject) test and a skills test.
qs.e: 学科 = a field/subject of study, or an academic department; also 'written test' (vs practical). 学校 = a school (the institution). 学年 = a school year/grade level. 学問 = scholarship/learning/academic study (in the abstract).

qs.s: 「学科」の意味は？
o: a subject of study; academic department; written test
qs.e: 学科 refers to a course/department of study (英文学科 = English literature department) and the written/theory portion of an exam (学科試験 = written test).

m: sure enough; as expected; (with question) really; I wonder if

ex.jp: 果たして彼の予想は当たった。
ex.en: Sure enough, his prediction came true.

qs.s: これほどの難題を、＿＿＿＿解決できるのだろうか。
qs.en: I wonder whether we can really solve such a difficult problem.
qs.e: 果たして = sure enough/as expected; (with a question) 'really, I wonder if.' せっかく = with effort/(a shame to waste). どうやら = apparently/it seems. たちまち = in an instant.

qs.s: 「果たして」の意味は？
o: sure enough; as expected; (in a question) really; I wonder if
qs.e: 果たして confirms an expectation (果たしてその通りだった = sure enough, it was so) or, with a question, expresses doubt (果たして本当だろうか = I wonder if it's really true).

m: resonance; reverberation; sound; ring (the impression a sound gives)

ex.jp: 鐘の響きが遠くまで届いた。
ex.en: The resonance of the bell reached far away.

qs.s: その言葉には、どこか懐かしい＿＿＿＿がある。
qs.en: Those words have a somehow nostalgic ring to them.
qs.e: 響き = resonance/the sound or ring something has (also the impression a word gives). 輝き(かがやき) = brilliance/shine. 香り(かおり) = scent/fragrance. 痛み(いたみ) = pain.

qs.s: 「響き」の意味は？
o: resonance; sound; the ring/impression a sound or word gives
qs.e: 響き is the reverberating sound, or the impression a word's sound conveys (言葉の響き = the ring of a word, 美しい響き = a beautiful sound). The verb is 響く.

ex.jp: 夏祭りに浴衣を着て出かけた。
ex.en: I went out to the summer festival wearing a yukata.

qs.s: 温泉旅館では、館内を＿＿＿＿で歩くことができる。
qs.en: At a hot-spring inn, you can walk around inside in a yukata.
qs.e: 浴衣 = a light cotton kimono worn in summer or after bathing. 水着(みずぎ) = a swimsuit. 制服(せいふく) = a uniform. 背広(せびろ) = a (men's) business suit.

qs.s: 「浴衣」の意味は？
o: yukata; a light cotton summer kimono
qs.e: 浴衣 is an informal cotton kimono worn at summer festivals, fireworks, and inns (浴衣を着る = wear a yukata). Lighter and more casual than a formal 着物.

ex.jp: 残り物を容器に移して冷蔵庫に入れた。
ex.en: I moved the leftovers into a container and put it in the fridge.

qs.s: 密閉できる＿＿＿＿に入れれば、食品が長持ちする。
qs.en: If you put food in a sealable container, it keeps longer.
qs.e: 容器 = a container/receptacle (that holds something). 内容 = the contents (what's inside). 容量 = capacity (how much it holds). 液体 = a liquid.

qs.s: 「容器」の意味は？
qs.e: 容器 is the vessel that holds contents (保存容器 = a storage container, ガラス容器 = a glass container). 内容 is what's inside; 容量 is its capacity.

m: presence or absence; whether or not (something exists)

ex.jp: アレルギーの有無を確認する。
ex.en: We check for the presence or absence of allergies.

qs.s: 経験の＿＿＿＿にかかわらず、誰でも応募できます。
qs.en: Regardless of whether you have experience, anyone can apply.
qs.e: 有無 = presence or absence (yes/no, whether it exists). 多少(たしょう) = more or less/some amount. 良否(りょうひ) = good or bad (quality). 賛否(さんぴ) = for or against (approval/disapproval).

qs.s: 「有無」の意味は？
o: presence or absence; whether or not something exists
for or against; approval or disapproval
qs.e: 有無 pairs 有 (have/exist) and 無 (not have) — whether something is present (有無を確認 = check for presence, 有無を言わさず = without taking no for an answer).

ex.jp: 一人で全部やり遂げて、本当に偉いね。
ex.en: You did it all by yourself — that's really admirable.

qs.s: 会議には会社の＿＿＿＿人たちが大勢出席していた。
qs.en: Many high-ranking people from the company attended the meeting.
qs.e: 偉い = great/admirable; high-ranking/important (of a person). 幼い(おさない) = young/childish. 賢い(かしこい) = clever/wise. 鈍い(にぶい) = dull/slow.

qs.s: 「偉い」の意味は？
qs.e: 偉い praises someone's achievement or character (偉い人 = an important/great person, よく頑張って偉い = well done, you did great).

ex.jp: 弟とは学年が二つ違う。
ex.en: My younger brother is two school grades apart from me.

qs.s: 同じ＿＿＿＿の生徒が、一つの教室で授業を受ける。
qs.en: Students of the same grade take classes in one classroom.
qs.e: 学年 = a school year/grade level. 学期(がっき) = a term/semester (a part of the school year). 学費 = tuition/school fees. 学歴 = one's educational background/credentials.

qs.s: 「学年」の意味は？
qs.e: 学年 is which year/grade a student is in (学年が上がる = move up a grade, 同学年 = the same grade). 学期 is a term within the year.

ex.jp: 貨物を船で海外へ運ぶ。
ex.en: The cargo is carried overseas by ship.

qs.s: この線路は、旅客ではなく＿＿＿＿の輸送に使われている。
qs.en: This rail line is used for freight transport, not passengers.
qs.e: 貨物 = cargo/freight (goods being transported). 旅客(りょかく) = passengers (as a category in transport). 乗客 = a passenger (on board). 郵便 = mail/post.

qs.s: 「貨物」の意味は？
qs.e: 貨物 is freight/cargo (貨物列車 = a freight train, 貨物船 = a cargo ship). Contrast 旅客 (passengers).

ex.jp: 彼女は私立の高校に通っている。
ex.en: She attends a private high school.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿大学は、国立に比べて学費が高い傾向がある。
qs.en: Private universities tend to have higher tuition than national ones.
qs.e: 私立 = private (privately founded and run). 国立 = national (run by the central government). 公立 = public (run by local government). 県立(けんりつ) = prefectural (run by a prefecture).

qs.s: 「私立」の意味は？
o: national; run by the central government
qs.e: 私立 means privately operated (私立学校 = private school, 私立病院 = private hospital). Contrast 国立/公立 (publicly run). Sometimes read わたくしりつ to avoid confusion with 市立(しりつ).

m: ascent; uphill; inbound (train, toward the capital)

ex.jp: 東京方面行きの上りの電車に乗る。
ex.en: I take the inbound train heading toward Tokyo.

qs.s: 連休の最終日は、＿＿＿＿の道路が大渋滞する。
qs.en: On the last day of the long weekend, the inbound roads get heavily congested.
qs.e: 上り(のぼり) = ascent/uphill; inbound (toward Tokyo/the city center). 下り(くだり) = descent/downhill; outbound (away from the capital). 回り(まわり) = going around/surroundings. 通り(とおり) = a street; as (per).

qs.s: 「上り」の意味は？
qs.e: 上り means going up or heading toward the capital (上り坂 = uphill slope, 上り電車 = inbound train). Opposite of 下り (down/outbound).

ex.jp: 問題は話し合いで解決しよう。
ex.en: Let's resolve the problem through discussion.

qs.s: 対立を避け、十分な＿＿＿＿を重ねて結論を出した。
qs.en: Avoiding conflict, we held thorough discussions and reached a conclusion.
qs.e: 話し合い = a discussion/talks (parties conferring to reach agreement). 言い争い = a quarrel/argument (disputing angrily). 打ち合わせ = a (planning/business) meeting to coordinate. 問い合わせ = an inquiry (asking for info).

qs.s: 「話し合い」の意味は？
qs.e: 話し合い is talking things over to reach understanding (話し合いで決める = decide by discussion). The verb is 話し合う.

ex.jp: この病院は夜間も診察を受け付けている。
ex.en: This hospital accepts examinations even at night.

qs.s: 昼は働きながら、＿＿＿＿の学校で資格の勉強をしている。
qs.en: While working in the daytime, I study for a qualification at a night school.
qs.e: 夜間 = nighttime/during the night (a span of hours). 昼間(ひるま) = daytime. 早朝(そうちょう) = early morning. 深夜(しんや) = the dead of night/late at night (a narrower, deeper part of the night).

qs.s: 「夜間」の意味は？
o: the dead of night; very late at night
qs.e: 夜間 covers the nighttime hours (夜間営業 = nighttime business hours, 夜間飛行 = a night flight). Opposite of 昼間 (daytime).

m: coming to Japan; a visit to Japan (by a foreigner)

ex.jp: 有名な歌手が来日し、コンサートを開いた。
ex.en: A famous singer came to Japan and held a concert.

qs.s: その大統領の＿＿＿＿は、両国の関係改善につながった。
qs.en: That president's visit to Japan led to improved relations between the two countries.
qs.e: 来日 = (a foreigner) coming to Japan. 出国(しゅっこく) = leaving the country/departing abroad. 帰国 = returning to one's home country. 渡米(とべい) = going to America.

qs.s: 「来日」の意味は？
qs.e: 来日 specifically means coming to Japan, used for foreigners or those arriving from abroad (初来日 = first visit to Japan).

m: unexpectedly; surprisingly; more than one thought

ex.jp: 難しそうに見えたが、案外簡単だった。
ex.en: It looked hard, but it was unexpectedly easy.

qs.s: 心配していた試験は、＿＿＿＿うまくいった。
qs.en: The exam I'd been worried about went surprisingly well.
qs.e: 案外 = unexpectedly/surprisingly (contrary to what one assumed). 予想通り = as expected/as predicted (the opposite). ますます = increasingly. めったに = (with neg.) rarely.

qs.s: 「案外」の意味は？
o: unexpectedly; surprisingly; more than one thought
qs.e: 案外 means the result differs from expectation (案外おいしい = surprisingly tasty). ≒ 意外と. Opposite nuance to 予想通り.

ex.jp: この木はおいしい果実をつける。
ex.en: This tree bears delicious fruit.

qs.s: このジュースは、新鮮な＿＿＿＿を絞って作られている。
qs.en: This juice is made by squeezing fresh fruit.
qs.e: 果実 = fruit (the produce of a plant; also figurative 'fruits of labor'). 野菜 = vegetables. 穀物(こくもつ) = grains/cereals. 種子(しゅし) = seeds.

qs.s: 「果実」の意味は？
qs.e: 果実 is the fruit a plant produces (果実酒 = fruit wine); figuratively, the fruits of effort (努力の果実 = the fruits of one's labor). 果物(くだもの) is the everyday word for edible fruit.

ex.jp: 人気のラーメン店には長い行列ができていた。
ex.en: A long line had formed at the popular ramen shop.

qs.s: 開店前から、店の前には＿＿＿＿ができていた。
qs.en: A queue had formed in front of the shop even before it opened.
qs.e: 行列 = a line/queue of people; a procession. 渋滞 = a traffic jam (congestion of vehicles). 集団 = a group/collective body. 群衆(ぐんしゅう) = a crowd/throng (a mass of people).

qs.s: 「行列」の意味は？
qs.e: 行列 is people lined up in a row (行列ができる = a queue forms, 行列に並ぶ = wait in line). Also a parade/procession, and 'matrix' in math.

m: masterpiece; one's best work; (colloquial) a real hoot

ex.jp: この絵は彼の傑作と言われている。
ex.en: This painting is said to be his masterpiece.

qs.s: 数ある作品の中でも、これは間違いなく＿＿＿＿だ。
qs.en: Among his many works, this is without doubt a masterpiece.
qs.e: 傑作 = a masterpiece/one's finest work (outstanding). 失敗作 = a failed/botched work. 試作 = a trial/prototype piece. 量産 = mass production. 傑作 ≒ 名作, but 傑作 stresses standout brilliance/originality.

qs.s: 「傑作」の意味は？
qs.e: 傑作 is an exceptionally excellent work (歴史的傑作 = a historic masterpiece). Colloquially it can mean 'hilarious' (あの話は傑作だ = that story is a riot).

m: sign; indication; hint; presence (felt, not clearly seen)

ex.jp: 背後に人の気配を感じた。
ex.en: I sensed the presence of someone behind me.

qs.s: 空が暗くなり、雨が降り出す＿＿＿＿がしてきた。
qs.en: The sky darkened, and there were signs that it would start raining.
qs.e: 気配 = a subtle sign/indication or felt presence (sensed indirectly). 気分 = mood/feeling (one's state of mind). 気候 = climate (long-term weather). 景色(けしき) = scenery/a view.

qs.s: 「気配」の意味は？
o: a sign; indication; felt presence (sensed indirectly)
qs.e: 気配 is a faint sign or presence you sense rather than clearly see (人の気配 = a sense that someone's there, 春の気配 = signs of spring).

ex.jp: 審査は公正に行われた。
ex.en: The screening was conducted fairly.

qs.s: 審判には、どちらにも偏らない＿＿＿＿な判断が求められる。
qs.en: A referee is required to make fair judgments that favor neither side.
qs.e: 公正 = fairness/justice (proper and unbiased, often institutional). 公平 = impartiality/even-handedness (treating all equally). 正直 = honest/truthful. 公開 = open to the public/disclosure. 公正 and 公平 overlap; 公正 stresses rightness/justice, 公平 stresses equal treatment.

qs.s: 「公正」の意味は？
qs.e: 公正 means just and unbiased (公正取引 = fair trade, 公正な審査 = fair screening). 公平 emphasizes equal/even treatment of parties.

m: east and west; (figurative) all around; everywhere

ex.jp: この道は東西に長く伸びている。
ex.en: This road stretches long from east to west.

qs.s: 古今＿＿＿＿、人々は幸福を求めてきた。
qs.en: In all ages and places (lit. past-present, east-west), people have sought happiness.
qs.e: 東西 = east and west; figuratively 'everywhere/all places.' 南北 = north and south. 左右 = left and right. 上下 = up and down. The set phrase 古今東西 = all times and places.

qs.s: 「東西」の意味は？
o: east and west; (fig.) all places; everywhere
qs.e: 東西 pairs east (東) and west (西); 東西南北 = the four cardinal directions. 古今東西 = throughout all ages and places.

ex.jp: 彼は皮肉を込めて笑った。
ex.en: He laughed with a touch of sarcasm.

qs.s: 晴れを願ったのに大雨とは、＿＿＿＿なものだ。
qs.en: We wished for sunshine and got heavy rain — how ironic.
qs.e: 皮肉 = irony/sarcasm (saying the opposite to criticize, or a cruel twist of fate). 本音(ほんね) = one's true feelings (vs the front one puts up). 素直 = honest/obedient/frank. 正直 = honest/truthful.

qs.s: 「皮肉」の意味は？
o: irony; sarcasm; a cutting remark; an ironic twist
qs.e: 皮肉 is biting sarcasm or an ironic situation (皮肉を言う = make a sarcastic remark, 皮肉なことに = ironically). The な-adjective form 皮肉な means 'ironic.'

m: after this; from now on; hereafter; thereafter

ex.jp: 以後、気をつけます。
ex.en: I'll be careful from now on.

qs.s: 一度トラブルがあって＿＿＿＿、その店には行っていない。
qs.en: After there was trouble once, I haven't gone to that shop since.
qs.e: 以後 = after this/thereafter (from a point onward, often warning/resolving 'from now on'). 以前 = before/previously. 以内 = within (a limit, inclusive). 以降 = from ~ onward (≒以後 for time, slightly more neutral/scheduling).

qs.s: 「以後」の意味は？
o: after this; from now on; hereafter; thereafter
qs.e: 以後 means from a certain point onward (それ以後 = after that, 以後気をつける = be careful henceforth). Very close to 以降; 以後 often carries a 'from now on' resolve.

ex.jp: 大学で演劇のサークルに入った。
ex.en: In university I joined a theater club.

qs.s: 彼女は将来、＿＿＿＿の世界で女優として活躍したいそうだ。
qs.en: She says she wants to thrive as an actress in the world of theater someday.
qs.e: 演劇 = theater/drama (live stage plays). 映画 = film/cinema. 音楽 = music. 舞踊(ぶよう) = dance (esp. traditional).

qs.s: 「演劇」の意味は？
qs.e: 演劇 is the art of stage drama (演劇部 = drama club, 演劇を観る = see a play). The performance itself is a 劇/芝居.

ex.jp: 日本には活動中の火山が多い。
ex.en: Japan has many active volcanoes.

qs.s: その＿＿＿＿が噴火し、灰が周辺の町に降り注いだ。
qs.en: The volcano erupted, and ash rained down on the nearby towns.
qs.e: 火山 = a volcano. 地震 = an earthquake. 津波(つなみ) = a tsunami. 台風 = a typhoon.

qs.s: 「火山」の意味は？
qs.e: 火山 is a volcano (活火山 = active volcano, 火山灰 = volcanic ash, 火山が噴火する = a volcano erupts).

ex.jp: 彼のやり方は少し強引だ。
ex.en: His way of doing things is a bit forceful.

qs.s: 反対を押し切って、＿＿＿＿に計画を進めた。
qs.en: Overriding the objections, he pushed the plan through forcibly.
qs.e: 強引 = forcible/pushy (forcing things despite resistance). 慎重 = cautious/prudent. 丁寧 = polite/careful/courteous. 素直 = honest/obedient/receptive.

qs.s: 「強引」の意味は？
qs.e: 強引 describes forcing one's way despite opposition (強引に勧める = push something on someone, 強引なやり方 = a heavy-handed approach).

ex.jp: パーティーの司会を頼まれた。
ex.en: I was asked to be the MC for the party.

qs.s: その番組の＿＿＿＿は、話を進めるのがとても上手だ。
qs.en: The host of that show is very skilled at moving the conversation along.
qs.e: 司会 = chairing/hosting an event; the MC role. 出演(しゅつえん) = appearing/performing (as a guest/cast). 観客 = the audience/spectators. 主催(しゅさい) = organizing/sponsoring (the host organization of an event).

qs.s: 「司会」の意味は？
o: appearing/performing as a guest or cast
qs.e: 司会 is running/hosting an event or show (司会者 = the MC/host, 司会を務める = serve as MC). 主催 is the organizing body.

ex.jp: 美しい自然を子孫に残したい。
ex.en: I want to leave beautiful nature for future generations.

qs.s: 彼はその有名な武将の＿＿＿＿だと言われている。
qs.en: He is said to be a descendant of that famous warlord.
qs.e: 子孫 = descendants/offspring (later generations). 祖先(そせん) = ancestors (the opposite). 親戚(しんせき) = relatives. 家族 = family (immediate household).

qs.s: 「子孫」の意味は？
qs.e: 子孫 are the generations that come after (子孫を残す = leave descendants, 子々孫々 = generations to come). Opposite of 祖先/先祖 (ancestors).

ex.jp: 彼は新しい小説の執筆に取りかかった。
ex.en: He set about writing a new novel.

qs.s: その学者は、専門誌に論文を＿＿＿＿している。
qs.en: That scholar writes papers for specialized journals.
qs.e: 執筆 = writing/authoring a text as a writer (composing articles, books). 記入 = filling in/entering (data in a form). 出版 = publishing (issuing a work). 印刷 = printing.

qs.s: 「執筆」の意味は？
o: writing; authoring a book or article
filling in; entering data in a form
qs.e: 執筆 specifically means the act of writing/authoring (執筆者 = the writer/author, 執筆中 = currently writing). 出版 is publishing the finished work.

m: score; marks; points; (also) number of items

ex.jp: テストの点数が上がって嬉しい。
ex.en: I'm happy my test score went up.

qs.s: 出品された作品の＿＿＿＿は、全部で五十点に上った。
qs.en: The number of submitted works came to fifty pieces in all.
qs.e: 点数 = a score/marks; also a count of items (counted with 点). 回数 = number of times/frequency. 枚数 = number of flat sheets. 人数 = number of people.

qs.s: 「点数」の意味は？
o: score; marks; points; (also) number of items
qs.e: 点数 mainly means a score (テストの点数 = test marks, 点数をつける = grade/score) and also a count of items (出品点数 = number of entries).

m: husband and wife; a (married) couple (polite, of others)

ex.jp: 田中夫妻をパーティーに招待した。
ex.en: We invited Mr. and Mrs. Tanaka to the party.

qs.s: 記念式典には、大統領＿＿＿＿が出席された。
qs.en: The President and his wife attended the commemorative ceremony.
qs.e: 夫妻 = a married couple, used politely when referring to others (e.g. 〜夫妻). 夫婦(ふうふ) = a married couple (general, including oneself). 親子 = parent and child. 兄弟 = siblings/brothers.

qs.s: 「夫妻」の意味は？
o: husband and wife; a couple (polite, of others)
qs.e: 夫妻 is a respectful term for someone else's married couple (ご夫妻 = the (honored) couple). 夫婦 is the neutral everyday word and can include oneself.

ex.jp: 年末は臨時のアルバイトを雇う。
ex.en: At year-end, we hire temporary part-timers.

qs.s: 急な需要に対応するため、＿＿＿＿の列車が運行された。
qs.en: To meet sudden demand, special (extra) trains were run.
qs.e: 臨時 = temporary/special/ad hoc (set up for a particular occasion, not regular). 定期 = regular/scheduled (at fixed intervals). 通常 = normal/usual. 永久(えいきゅう) = permanent/eternal.

qs.s: 「臨時」の意味は？
qs.e: 臨時 means provided for a special occasion, not on the regular schedule (臨時休業 = temporary closure, 臨時ニュース = a special news bulletin, 臨時収入 = unexpected income).

ex.jp: 彼は一流の料理人だ。
ex.en: He is a first-class chef.

qs.s: その選手は、世界でも＿＿＿＿のレベルにある。
qs.en: That athlete is at a first-class level even on the world stage.
qs.e: 一流 = first-class/top-tier (the best). 二流(にりゅう) = second-rate. 三流(さんりゅう) = third-rate/inferior. 流行 = a trend/fashion (unrelated meaning, a distractor).

qs.s: 「一流」の意味は？
qs.e: 一流 means top-tier in quality or status (一流企業 = a top company, 一流のホテル = a first-class hotel). Below it: 二流, 三流.

m: all at once; simultaneously; in unison

ex.jp: 号令で全員が一斉に立ち上がった。
ex.en: At the command, everyone stood up all at once.

qs.s: 開始の合図で、ランナーたちが＿＿＿＿にスタートを切った。
qs.en: At the starting signal, the runners all set off at once.
qs.e: 一斉(に) = all at once/simultaneously (everyone together). 順番(に) = in turn/in order (one after another). 個別(に) = individually/separately. 交互(に) = alternately/by turns.

qs.s: 「一斉」の意味は？
o: all at once; simultaneously; in unison
qs.e: 一斉 means many doing the same thing at the same moment (一斉に = all together, 一斉送信 = sending to everyone at once).

m: a perfect score; full marks; (figurative) flawless

ex.jp: 漢字のテストで満点を取った。
ex.en: I got a perfect score on the kanji test.

qs.s: 味もサービスも申し分なく、この店は＿＿＿＿だ。
qs.en: The taste and service are impeccable — this restaurant is top marks.
qs.e: 満点 = a perfect score/full marks; figuratively flawless. 零点 = a score of zero (the opposite). 半分 = half. 平均 = the average.

qs.s: 「満点」の意味は？
o: a perfect score; full marks; flawless
qs.e: 満点 means a perfect score (100点満点 = out of a perfect 100) and figuratively faultless (栄養満点 = packed with nutrition). Opposite of 零点.

ex.jp: 彼は舞台で活躍する役者だ。
ex.en: He is an actor who shines on the stage.

qs.s: あの＿＿＿＿の演技は、観客を涙させるほど見事だった。
qs.en: That actor's performance was so superb it brought the audience to tears.
qs.e: 役者 = an actor/performer (esp. stage). 観客 = the audience/spectators. 作家 = a writer/author. 監督 = a director (film) / a manager/coach.

qs.s: 「役者」の意味は？
qs.e: 役者 means an actor (役者になる = become an actor). Figuratively, 役者が上 = the more cunning/capable one (役者が一枚上 = a cut above in shrewdness). ≒ 俳優.

ex.jp: 身を守るための自衛の手段を考える。
ex.en: I consider self-defense measures to protect myself.

qs.s: 詐欺の被害に遭わないよう、＿＿＿＿の意識を持つことが大切だ。
qs.en: It's important to have a self-defense mindset so as not to fall victim to fraud.
qs.e: 自衛 = defending oneself by one's own means. 防衛 = defense (protecting against attack, often national/organizational). 攻撃 = attack/offense. 護衛(ごえい) = guarding/escorting (protecting someone else).

qs.s: 「自衛」の意味は？
qs.e: 自衛 means protecting oneself through one's own efforts (自衛手段 = self-protection measures, 自衛隊 = the Self-Defense Forces).

ex.jp: 日本は四季の変化がはっきりしている。
ex.en: Japan has clearly distinct changes of the four seasons.

qs.s: この庭園では、＿＿＿＿折々の花を楽しむことができる。
qs.en: In this garden, you can enjoy the flowers of each of the four seasons.
qs.e: 四季 = the four seasons (spring, summer, autumn, winter as a set). 季節 = a season (any one season). 気候 = climate (long-term weather pattern). 天気 = the (day's) weather.

qs.s: 「四季」の意味は？
qs.e: 四季 refers to the four seasons collectively (四季折々 = each season in turn, 四季を通じて = throughout the year).

m: gap; crack; opening; (figurative) a free moment

ex.jp: ドアの隙間から光が漏れている。
ex.en: Light is leaking through the gap in the door.

qs.s: 家具の＿＿＿＿にほこりがたまりやすい。
qs.en: Dust easily collects in the gaps between furniture.
qs.e: 隙間 = a gap/crack/narrow opening between things. 表面 = the surface. 角度 = an angle. 距離 = distance between points.

qs.s: 「隙間」の意味は？
o: gap; crack; narrow opening between things
qs.e: 隙間 is a narrow space between things (隙間風 = a draft through a crack, 隙間時間 = spare moments between tasks).

m: being accepted/valid; passing as; holding good (currency, an excuse)

ex.jp: その言い訳はもう通用しない。
ex.en: That excuse won't fly anymore.

qs.s: 日本の常識が、海外でそのまま＿＿＿＿するとは限らない。
qs.en: What's common sense in Japan doesn't necessarily hold good abroad as is.
qs.e: 通用 = being accepted as valid / passing (an excuse, currency, skills holding up). 通行 = passage/going along (foot/vehicle traffic). 通過 = passing through a point. 通信 = communication (telecom).

qs.s: 「通用」の意味は？
o: being accepted as valid; passing as; holding good
qs.e: 通用 means being accepted or holding good (世界に通用する = good enough for the world stage, 通用しない = won't pass/won't fly).

m: the number of flat/thin objects (sheets, plates, etc.)

ex.jp: 印刷する枚数を確認する。
ex.en: I check the number of sheets to print.

qs.s: 参加者の人数に合わせて、配る資料の＿＿＿＿を増やした。
qs.en: I increased the number of handout sheets to match the number of participants.
qs.e: 枚数 = the count of flat thin things (sheets of paper, plates, shirts — counted with 枚). 人数 = number of people. 回数 = number of times. 点数 = score; or count of items (counted with 点).

qs.s: 「枚数」の意味は？
o: the number of flat/thin objects (sheets, plates)
qs.e: 枚数 counts flat objects that take the counter 枚 (紙の枚数 = number of sheets, チケットの枚数 = number of tickets).

ex.jp: 新聞の見出しだけ読んだ。
ex.en: I read only the newspaper headlines.

qs.s: その事件は、各紙の一面の＿＿＿＿を大きく飾った。
qs.en: That incident prominently graced the front-page headlines of every paper.
qs.e: 見出し = a headline/heading (a short title leading text). 本文(ほんぶん) = the main body text. 目次(もくじ) = the table of contents. あとがき = the afterword/postscript.

qs.s: 「見出し」の意味は？
qs.e: 見出し is a headline or heading that labels content (大見出し = a banner headline, 見出し語 = a dictionary headword).

m: carelessness; letting one's guard down; negligence

ex.jp: 油断して財布をすられた。
ex.en: I let my guard down and had my wallet pickpocketed.

qs.s: リードしていても、最後まで＿＿＿＿は禁物だ。
qs.en: Even when in the lead, letting your guard down is forbidden until the end.
qs.e: 油断 = carelessness/letting one's guard down (failing to stay alert). 用心(ようじん) = caution/care/wariness (the opposite). 緊張 = tension/nervousness. 集中 = concentration.

qs.s: 「油断」の意味は？
o: carelessness; letting one's guard down; negligence
qs.e: 油断 means a lapse in vigilance (油断大敵 = carelessness is your worst enemy, 油断するな = stay on guard). Opposite of 用心.

m: exchange (of money); foreign exchange; money order

ex.jp: 為替の変動で輸出企業が影響を受けた。
ex.en: Exporters were affected by exchange-rate fluctuations.

qs.s: 円安が進み、＿＿＿＿レートが大きく動いた。
qs.en: The yen weakened, and the exchange rate moved significantly.
qs.e: 為替 = currency exchange / foreign exchange (為替レート = exchange rate). 税率(ぜいりつ) = the tax rate. 金利(きんり) = the interest rate. 物価(ぶっか) = (consumer) price levels.

qs.s: 「為替」の意味は？
o: exchange of money; foreign exchange; money order
qs.e: 為替 concerns currency exchange (為替相場 = the exchange market/rate, 外国為替 = foreign exchange/forex). Originally also a money order.

ex.jp: 誰にでも弱点はある。
ex.en: Everyone has weak points.

qs.s: 相手チームの＿＿＿＿を分析して、作戦を立てた。
qs.en: We analyzed the opposing team's weaknesses and formed a strategy.
qs.e: 弱点 = a weak point/vulnerability (a flaw to exploit or improve). 長所(ちょうしょ) = a strong point/merit. 利点(りてん) = an advantage/benefit. 強み(つよみ) = a strength/forte.

qs.s: 「弱点」の意味は？
qs.e: 弱点 is a vulnerability or shortcoming (弱点を克服する = overcome a weakness, 弱点を突く = strike at a weak spot). Opposite of 長所/強み.

m: to raise; to heighten; to enhance; to boost

ex.jp: 練習を重ねて技術を高める。
ex.en: To enhance one's skill through repeated practice.

qs.s: 防犯意識を＿＿＿＿ことで、被害を減らせる。
qs.en: By raising crime-prevention awareness, we can reduce damage.
qs.e: 高める = to raise/heighten/enhance (a level, quality, awareness). 深める = to deepen (understanding, ties). 広める = to spread/popularize (make widely known). 強いる(しいる) = to force/compel.

qs.s: 「高める」の意味は？
o: to raise; to heighten; to enhance; to boost
qs.e: 高める (transitive) means to raise a level or quality (意識を高める = raise awareness, 質を高める = improve quality). The intransitive pair is 高まる.

ex.jp: 大きなファイルを圧縮して送った。
ex.en: I compressed the large file and sent it.

qs.s: 空気を＿＿＿＿してタンクにためる装置だ。
qs.en: It's a device that compresses air and stores it in a tank.
qs.e: 圧縮 = compressing/condensing (reducing volume by pressure). 拡大 = enlargement/expansion. 膨張(ぼうちょう) = expansion/swelling (volume increasing). 分散 = dispersion/scattering.

qs.s: 「圧縮」の意味は？
qs.e: 圧縮 means squeezing into a smaller space (圧縮ファイル = a compressed file, データ圧縮 = data compression). Opposite of 膨張 (expansion).

m: the public; the general public; people at large

ex.jp: 昔は街角に公衆電話があった。
ex.en: In the old days there were public telephones on street corners.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿の面前で恥をかかされ、彼は怒った。
qs.en: Humiliated in front of the public, he got angry.
qs.e: 公衆 = the general public (people at large, as users of public facilities). 群衆(ぐんしゅう) = a crowd/throng (a physical mass). 観衆(かんしゅう) = the spectators/an audience watching. 民衆(みんしゅう) = the common people/the masses (sociopolitical).

qs.s: 「公衆」の意味は？
o: the general public; people at large
qs.e: 公衆 refers to the public in general (公衆衛生 = public health, 公衆トイレ = public restroom, 公衆の面前で = in public).

m: to draw near; to approach; to press (someone for); to loom

ex.jp: 締め切りが迫っている。
ex.en: The deadline is approaching.

qs.s: 危険が目の前に＿＿＿＿、彼らは慌てて避難した。
qs.en: With danger looming right before them, they hurriedly evacuated.
qs.e: 迫る = to draw near/loom/press (closing in, time running out, or pressing a demand). 離れる = to move away/separate. 遅れる = to be late/fall behind. 隠れる = to hide.

qs.s: 「迫る」の意味は？
o: to draw near; to approach; to loom; to press (a demand)
to be late; to fall behind
qs.e: 迫る means closing in (期限が迫る = a deadline looms, 決断を迫る = press someone to decide, 山が海に迫る = mountains hug the sea).
